# kaleido_platform_wfe_stream_factory (Resource)

The Workflow Engine Stream Factory resource allows you to manage stream factories that create pre-configured streams in the Workflow Engine.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_type` (String) The config type ID to associate with this stream factory
- `environment` (String) Environment ID
- `event_source_json` (String) The event source configuration for the stream factory. JSON for the handler or transaction payload matching `event_source_type` (the provider sets the `type` field and nests this object under the corresponding key).
- `event_source_type` (String) The type of event source for this stream factory
- `name` (String) The name of the stream factory
- `service` (String) Workflow Engine service ID

### Optional

- `constants_json` (String) Constants passed into the configMapping JSONata evaluation
- `description` (String) Description of the stream factory
- `parameters_schema_json` (String) OpenAPI compliant JSON Schema for the input parameters passed to the stream factory
- `uniqueness_prefix` (String) Default string prefix to prepend to all 'topic' and 'idempotencyKey' values generated by this stream factory, if not provided in the stream creation input

### Read-Only

- `api_url` (String) The base URL of the generated API. A copy of the Swagger UI can be loaded directly from this location
- `created` (String) Creation timestamp
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `openapi_url` (String) URL that can be used to download an OpenAPI specification of the generated API
- `updated` (String) Last update timestamp
